title: Importar da China para o Brasil: solução completa para sua empresa | China Gate
description: Especialistas em importação da China para o Brasil com segurança e lucratividade. Cursos e serviços completos para o seu negócio.
extracted:
### Business Model
- Solution de Ponta a Ponta for importing from China to companies in Brazil.
- Importação de um jeito fácil e de baixo custo, ideal for those starting to import.
- Preço fixo por metro cúbico with weekly departures from China.
- Through conteúdos gratuitos in social networks, courses, and services focused on starting and scaling imports.
- Team with more than 90 professionals in Brazil and partner offices in various Chinese cities.
- Helps people import from China to their Brazilian companies with security and viability.

### Services
- Complete solution for importing from China to Brazil.
- Frete da China para o Brasil (shipping rates from China to Brazil, with updated values, deadlines, and tips for choosing the best shipping type).
- Content on reducing costs and increasing profit in 2026 by importing directly from China to resell in Brazil.
- Jornada da Importação event (guides entrepreneurs on suppliers, costs, negotiation, and logistics for safe and profitable importing).
- Assistance with items requiring Inmetro certification.

### Pricing
- Preço fixo por metro cúbico (fixed price per cubic meter) for easy, low-cost imports.
- Taxas do frete da China para o Brasil em 2026: valores atualizados (shipping rates from China to Brazil in 2026: updated values) – specific numerical values not listed.

### Target Customers
- Companies in Brazil importing from China.
- People/entrepreneurs starting and scaling imports from China to Brazil.
- Importers dealing with products requiring Inmetro certification.
- Brazilian importers highlighted in Yiwu market (noted as among principal buyers).
